name: Maglit40
description: TRRSケーブルで左右分割、磁気ポゴピンで一体型としても使える40%キーボード。XIAO RP2040、Remap対応QMK、LEDインジケータを備えた小型ビルド。
descriptionEn: A 40% keyboard that can work as a split board over TRRS or as a unibody board through magnetic pogo pins. It uses XIAO RP2040 controllers, Remap-ready QMK, and LED indicators.
